notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Brent Rooker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to second baseman Ozzie Albies to first baseman Matt Olson. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Brent Rooker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Wilson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Wilson reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Lawrence Butler grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jacob Wilson out at 2nd. Lawrence Butler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: With Drake Baldwin batting, Ronald Acuña Jr. picked off and caught stealing 2nd base, shortstop Jacob Wilson.

notableEvents.label: Mike Yastrzemski pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mike Yastrzemski flies out to center fielder Lawrence Butler.
